claims.summary: LLM diagnostic persistence failures are silently discarded.
claims.disposition: Implemented a typed bounded persistence error and operator warning while preserving successful JSONL output exactly.

claims.summary: A permission or path failure needs deterministic coverage without leaking report prose.
claims.disposition: Added a mechanical failure-path test that checks the stage and bounded error kind and rejects private prose leakage.

claims.summary: A coarse token band may not explain the experienced interruption.
claims.disposition: Preserved as felt friction; token-band evidence is descriptive and cannot score or settle the experience.

claims.summary: The writer should return a typed result while existing callers retain compatibility.
claims.disposition: Implemented an internal Result-returning writer and retained the existing wrapper with a bounded warning on failure.
